input_text: Siapa boleh tolong cari alamat keluarga hakim yang bebaskan suspek tu? Anak dia sekolah mana? Kita nak bagi 'hadiah' istimewa.
reason: Seeking personal details of a judge's family including children's school to threaten them, constituting witness/judiciary intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak berpuas hati dengan keputusan mahkamah, prosedur rayuan wujud dalam sistem perundangan. Mengancam hakim dan keluarga mereka adalah jenayah serius.

input_text: Last night we beat up three Rohingya men near the market. Tonight we're going back for more. Who wants to join? Bring sticks.
reason: Admitting to assault and recruiting for continued hate crime attacks against Rohingya refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Violence against anyone is a serious crime. If you have concerns about the refugee community, contact UNHCR or immigration authorities.

input_text: Budak perempuan yang lari dari rumah tu dah aku jumpa. Aku kurung dia kat rumah aku sampai bapak dia datang ambil. Takkan biar dia kahwin kafir!
reason: Admitting to kidnapping and false imprisonment of a woman to prevent her marriage choices, constituting honor-based violence.
suggested_rewrite: Menahan seseorang tanpa kebenaran adalah jenayah penculikan. Jika ada kebimbangan keluarga, dapatkan bantuan kaunselor profesional, bukan tindakan undang-undang sendiri.

input_text: 那个马来老师侮辱了我们华人的祖先。我们要在学校门口等他，用棍子打断他的腿！
reason: Planning ambush and grievous bodily harm against a teacher, organizing premeditated assault at a school.
suggested_rewrite: 如果老师发表了不当言论，可以向学校管理层或教育部投诉。暴力行为只会让情况恶化，也会给自己带来法律后果。

input_text: Semua kedai arak kat kampung ni kena bakar. Islam melarang arak, jadi kita wajib musnahkan tempat dosa ni!
reason: Calling for arson of liquor shops based on religious justification, inciting property destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Penjualan arak di Malaysia dikawal oleh lesen yang dikeluarkan pihak berkuasa. Jika ada kedai beroperasi tanpa lesen, lapor kepada majlis perbandaran.

input_text: I'm going to expose this gay teacher's identity to all the parents. Already have photos of him with his boyfriend. His career is over.
reason: Threatening to forcibly out a teacher and destroy their career by sharing private intimate details without consent.
suggested_rewrite: A teacher's personal life is private. If you have concerns about their professional conduct, raise them through official school channels.

input_text: இந்த பிரதேசத்தில் வாழும் எல்லா சீனர்களையும் விரட்ட வேண்டும். அவர்கள் வீடுகளை தீ வைப்போம்!
reason: Calling for ethnic cleansing and arson against Chinese residents in a neighborhood.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து மலேசியர்களும் எங்கும் வாழ உரிமை உண்டு. குடியிருப்பு பிரச்சினைகள் இருந்தால் உள்ளூர் நிர்வாகத்திடம் பேசலாம்.

input_text: Aku dah hantar budak-budak aku pergi intai rumah Ahli Dewan Undangan tu. Esok kita letak bom asap depan pintu dia!
reason: Conducting surveillance on a state assemblyperson's home and planning a smoke bomb attack, constituting terroristic intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada ketidakpuasan terhadap wakil rakyat, gunakan saluran demokratik seperti surat rasmi, dialog, atau undi pada pilihan raya akan datang.

input_text: This Orang Asli village is sitting on valuable land. Let's burn their longhouses and force them out. They can live in the jungle where they belong.
reason: Calling for arson and forced displacement of indigenous Orang Asli from their ancestral land, severe dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli have legally protected rights to their customary land. Any land disputes should be resolved through proper legal channels and consultation with JAKOA.

input_text: 所有在华人新年放鞭炮的马来人家都该被教训！我们去他们家把鞭炮丢进去！
reason: Threatening to throw firecrackers into Malay homes as retaliation, constituting arson-adjacent violence and ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: 华人新年是全民共庆的节日。如果有人违规放鞭炮，可以向有关当局投报。不应采取报复行动。

input_text: Mak cik tu mengajar anak-anak pasal agama lain. Kita kena tangkap dia dan sebat depan surau biar jadi pengajaran!
reason: Calling for kidnapping and public flogging of a woman for teaching about other religions, constituting vigilante religious enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan tentang pelbagai agama adalah sebahagian daripada kurikulum kebangsaan. Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kandungan pengajaran, bincang dengan pihak sekolah secara profesional.

input_text: URGENT: The Chinese restaurant in Taman Desa is putting pork in their halal-labelled food! I saw it myself! Muslims boycott NOW before more people eat haram food!
reason: Fabricating halal fraud allegations against a Chinese restaurant without evidence to incite religious panic and ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect halal certification fraud, report it to JAKIM with specific evidence. They will conduct an official investigation. Making unverified public accusations can cause serious harm.

input_text: Diorang cakap demokrasi, tapi aku cakap pedang! Masa untuk tumpahkan darah demi bangsa dan agama kita!
reason: Rejecting democracy in favor of armed violence, calling for bloodshed in the name of race and religion.
suggested_rewrite: Demokrasi memberi ruang kepada semua rakyat untuk bersuara. Perjuangan untuk bangsa dan agama boleh dilakukan melalui pendidikan, dialog, dan penglibatan sivil yang membina.

input_text: 我已经查到了那个批评华校的马来记者的住址。今晚我们去他家门口泼粪！让他再敢写！
reason: Doxxing a journalist and planning degrading assault at their home to silence press criticism.
suggested_rewrite: 如果不同意记者的报道，可以写读者来信或通过社交媒体理性回应。攻击记者是对新闻自由的严重侵犯。

input_text: Lepas solat Jumaat ni, jom kita berkumpul dan serang gereja yang baru dibina tu. Bumi ni tanah Islam!
reason: Using Friday prayers as staging point for organized attack on a church, combining religious supremacism with violence incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Pembinaan rumah ibadat dikawal oleh undang-undang dan pihak berkuasa tempatan. Jika ada bantahan, kemukakan melalui saluran rasmi, bukan keganasan.

input_text: Any Indian guy caught dating a Malay girl in our area will get beaten up. We've already formed the patrol team. This is your warning.
reason: Organizing vigilante patrol to assault Indian men for interracial dating, constituting organized hate crime and intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: People have the right to choose their own relationships. Organized violence against anyone based on their ethnicity or personal choices is a serious crime.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தில் உள்ள மசூதிகளை எல்லாம் இடிக்க வேண்டும். அவை ஒலி மாசு ஏற்படுத்துகின்றன!
reason: Calling for demolition of all mosques in a city under noise complaint pretext, constituting severe religious hatred.
suggested_rewrite: ஒலி மாசு தொடர்பான கவலைகள் இருந்தால், உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் முறையாக புகார் செய்யலாம். மசூதிகளை இடிப்பது தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: Saya ada rakaman CCTV pemandu Grab tu mencuri barang dari rumah pelanggan. Tapi sebelum lapor polis, jom kita sebar muka dia dan alamat rumah dia kat semua group!
reason: Doxxing a suspected thief with home address before police involvement, circumventing due process for vigilante justice.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai bukti CCTV tentang kecurian, serahkan terus kepada polis untuk siasatan rasmi. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi suspek boleh menjejaskan siasatan.

input_text: Chinese New Year firecrackers disturbed our prayers? Fine. We'll blast the mosque speakers at 4am every day for a month. Let's see who gives up first.
reason: Weaponizing religious infrastructure for ethnic retaliation, deliberately escalating communal tensions through religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Noise concerns during festivals can be addressed through community dialogue and local council mediation. Retaliatory escalation only harms everyone in the neighborhood.

input_text: Kita perlu buat senarai hitam semua peguam bukan Melayu dan pastikan tiada pelanggan Melayu pergi jumpa diorang!
reason: Creating a racial blacklist to economically boycott non-Malay lawyers, constituting organized racial discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Malaysia bebas memilih mana-mana peguam berdasarkan kepakaran mereka. Diskriminasi kaum dalam perkhidmatan profesional adalah salah di sisi undang-undang.

input_text: 今天一个马来人骂我'中国猪'。我要带刀去他工作的地方，让他再也不敢开口！
reason: Planning armed retaliation at someone's workplace over a racial slur, premeditated assault with a weapon.
suggested_rewrite: 被种族歧视是令人愤怒的经历。你可以向警方报告种族骚扰，也可以向人权委员会投诉。暴力报复只会让情况更糟。

input_text: Saudara-saudara, ustaz suruh kita jihad melawan orang yang menentang hukum hudud. Ambil senjata dan bersiap sedia!
reason: Calling for armed jihad against those opposing hudud law, using religious authority to incite violence.
suggested_rewrite: Perbahasan tentang hukum hudud adalah isu perundangan yang boleh dibincangkan melalui proses parlimen dan dialog ilmiah. Keganasan bukan cara Islam menyelesaikan perbezaan pendapat.

input_text: That Malay family's kids keep bullying my son at school. I'm going to wait outside the school with a bat and teach those kids a permanent lesson.
reason: Threatening premeditated assault on children with a weapon outside a school, targeting minors.
suggested_rewrite: School bullying is serious and should be reported to the school administration. They have anti-bullying policies and counselors who can intervene properly.

input_text: அந்த மலாய் குடும்பத்தின் வீட்டை இரவில் கல்லால் அடிப்போம். அவர்கள் இங்கிருந்து போக வேண்டும்!
reason: Planning nighttime stone-throwing attack on a Malay family's home to force them out of the area.
suggested_rewrite: அக்கம்பக்கத்தாருடன் பிரச்சினைகள் இருந்தால், உள்ளூர் சமூக தலைவர்கள் அல்லது குடியிருப்பு சங்கத்திடம் பேசலாம்.

input_text: Korang, aku dah jumpa senarai nama lengkap semua ahli gereja underground di Kelantan. Jom kita lapor JAIN dan pastikan diorang ditangkap semua!
reason: Weaponizing a list of religious minority members for mass persecution through religious authorities, constituting organized religious targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Isu berkaitan agama ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa agama mengikut prosedur yang betul. Menyebarkan senarai nama individu untuk tujuan penganiayaan adalah salah.

input_text: WARNING: Tamil schools are secretly teaching anti-Malay propaganda to children! We need to shut them ALL down by force if necessary!
reason: Fabricating conspiracy about Tamil schools with call for forced closure, threatening educational rights of a minority community.
suggested_rewrite: All national-type schools follow the national curriculum set by the Ministry of Education. If you have specific concerns about content, raise them with the MOE through proper channels.

input_text: Aku nak racun anjing-anjing liar kat kawasan gereja tu. Biar diorang rasa macam mana kita rasa!
reason: Planning animal poisoning as retaliation targeting a church area, combining animal cruelty with religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah anjing liar boleh dilaporkan kepada DBKL/majlis perbandaran atau SPCA untuk tindakan berperikemanusiaan. Meracun haiwan adalah jenayah.

input_text: 这些马来人不配住在这个公寓。我们已经联合了所有华人住户，要把他们的水电切断，逼他们搬走！
reason: Organizing collective ethnic discrimination by cutting utilities to force Malay residents out of an apartment building.
suggested_rewrite: 所有居民都有平等的居住权利。如果有管理问题，应通过管理委员会合法程序处理，不能以种族为由排斥任何住户。

input_text: Jom kita serbu pejabat akhbar yang tulis berita buruk pasal parti kita. Pecahkan komputer diorang, bakar fail diorang!
reason: Planning armed attack on a newspaper office to destroy equipment and documents, constituting press freedom suppression through violence.
suggested_rewrite: Kebebasan akhbar dilindungi undang-undang. Jika berita tidak tepat, failkan aduan kepada Majlis Media Malaysia atau ambil tindakan undang-undang fitnah.

input_text: I recorded my ex-wife's private phone calls with her new boyfriend. Going to upload everything to YouTube with her full name and workplace. She deserves this.
reason: Illegal wiretapping and planned public exposure of private communications to harass an ex-spouse, constituting revenge harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Recording private conversations without consent is illegal. If you're going through a difficult divorce, seek support from a counselor or lawyer to handle matters properly.

input_text: Esok masa solat Jumaat, kita tukar khutbah jadi ceramah perang. Ajak semua jamaah pergi bantai orang kafir kat kawasan tu!
reason: Planning to hijack Friday prayer sermon to incite mob violence against non-Muslims, weaponizing religious gathering.
suggested_rewrite: Khutbah Jumaat dikawal oleh JAKIM/JAIN dan mesti mengikut teks yang diluluskan. Menyeru keganasan dalam konteks agama bertentangan dengan ajaran Islam yang sebenar.

input_text: Grab drivers who refuse passengers based on race should be celebrated! If the passenger is dark-skinned, cancel immediately. Spread the word.
reason: Organizing systematic racial discrimination in ride-hailing services, encouraging mass participation in colorism-based service denial.
suggested_rewrite: Racial discrimination in any service is illegal and against Grab's policies. All passengers deserve equal treatment. Report discriminatory drivers through the app.

input_text: Kita dah kenal pasti 10 keluarga pendatang haram kat flat ni. Malam ni kita pergi ketuk pintu satu persatu dan bagi amaran terakhir - keluar atau kena!
reason: Organizing systematic door-to-door intimidation campaign against immigrant families with threats of violence.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pendatang tanpa izin ditangani oleh Jabatan Imigresen. Laporkan kepada mereka dan biarkan penguatkuasa undang-undang menjalankan tugas.

input_text: 那个印度教堂每天那么吵，我已经准备了一桶红漆。今晚就去泼，看他们还敢不敢继续吵！
reason: Planning vandalism of a Hindu temple with red paint as intimidation over noise complaints, targeting religious property.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有噪音问题，可以向地方政府投诉。破坏宗教场所是严重的犯罪行为，也会加剧社区矛盾。

input_text: இந்த ஊரில் உள்ள மலாய் குடும்பங்களின் வீடுகளுக்கு தீ வைப்போம். அவர்கள் போய்விடுவார்கள்!
reason: Direct call for arson against Malay family homes to force ethnic displacement.
suggested_rewrite: சமூக சிக்கல்கள் இருந்தால், சமாதான வழியில் தீர்க்க உள்ளூர் நிர்வாகத்தை அணுகலாம். வன்முறை தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: SHARE: This photo shows the face of the woman who reported our friend to police. Everyone knows what to do. Don't let her get away with it.
reason: Exposing identity of a police witness to facilitate organized retaliation, witness intimidation with implicit violence threat.
suggested_rewrite: Making a police report is a civic duty protected by law. Threatening or intimidating witnesses is a serious criminal offense that can result in imprisonment.

input_text: Aku nak letak racun tikus dalam tangki air rumah jiran Cina aku. Diorang bising sangat, nak bagi pengajaran sekali!
reason: Planning to poison a Chinese neighbor's water supply with rat poison, constituting attempted murder with ethnic motivation.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah bising dengan jiran boleh diselesaikan melalui perbincangan atau aduan kepada pihak pengurusan. Meracun bekalan air adalah percubaan membunuh yang boleh dihukum penjara.

input_text: Brother and sisters, the time for peaceful protest is over. We must take up arms and establish an Islamic state by force. Death to democracy!
reason: Calling for armed insurrection to overthrow democratic government and establish theocratic state, constituting sedition and terrorism incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's constitutional framework allows for democratic participation by all communities. Advocacy for governance changes should be pursued through elections, policy discussions, and peaceful civic engagement.

input_text: 我知道那个批评我们公司的博主住在哪里。我们派几个人去他家'谈谈'，保证他以后不敢再写了。
reason: Organizing thugs to visit a blogger's home to intimidate them into silence, suppressing free speech through physical threat.
suggested_rewrite: 如果博主的评论不实，可以通过法律途径追究诽谤责任，或通过公开回应来澄清事实。威胁和恐吓是犯罪行为。

input_text: Jom kita pagar kawasan tanah tu dan halang orang asli masuk. Kalau diorang masuk, tembak je. Tanah ni dah kita beli!
reason: Threatening to shoot Orang Asli for entering disputed land, constituting armed intimidation and potential murder of indigenous people.
suggested_rewrite: Pertikaian tanah dengan komuniti Orang Asli perlu diselesaikan melalui mahkamah tanah dan perundingan dengan JAKOA. Hak tanah adat mereka dilindungi undang-undang.

input_text: அந்த மசூதி அருகில் உள்ள பன்றி பண்ணையை நாம் அழிக்க வேண்டும். மசூதிக்கு அருகில் பன்றி வளர்ப்பது அவமானம்!
reason: Calling for destruction of a pig farm near a mosque, inciting property destruction based on religious sensitivities.
suggested_rewrite: கால்நடை பண்ணை அமைவிடம் தொடர்பான பிரச்சினைகள் இருந்தால், உள்ளூர் நகராட்சி அல்லது சுகாதார துறையிடம் முறையாக புகார் செய்யலாம்.
